name: Suprise assault! Mutante homes destroyed
setup_text: Place 4 Unexhausted Haven Tokens (Source) as shown on map below. Set aside 4 Mutant tokens (Civilian).
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each character they control that is holding a Mutant during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules:
Interact (Haven): Flip this Haven and pick up a Mutant from it. Mutants are Limited. A character annot Interact with a Haven while is holding a Mutant.

Flee!: During the Cleanup Phase, remove all Mutants from the Game and Flip each Exhausted Haven.

name: Infinity Formula Goes Missing!
setup_text: Place 4 Serum Canister tokens (Point of Interest) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each Serum Canister they Secure during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules: During the Power Phase, characters Contesting a Serum Canister gain 1 POWER.

name: Super-Powered Scoundrels form sinister Syndicate
setup_text: Place 5 Ambush tokens (Points of Interest) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: Players score 1 VP for each Ambush they Secure during the Cleanup Phase.
special_rules: Characters contesting an Ambush have Cover from characters not Contesting the same Ambush.

name: Research Station Attacked!
setup_text: Place 1 Researcher token (Civilian) and 2 Evac Points (Assets) as shown on the map below.
scoring_text: A player scores 2 VPs if they are securing the Researcher during the Cleanup Phase. Then they score 1 additional VP if the Researcher is within RANGE 1 of their Evac Point.
special_rules:
During the Power Phase, the Researcher may move. If a player is securing the Researcher, they may Place it within RANGE 2 of its current location.

The Evac Point farthest from a player's battlefield edge is their Evac Point.
